rulings.Case Title: ANDREW PILLET VS. STEPHEN H KENDRICK ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 2, 2018, line 1. PLAINTIFF ANDREW PILLET Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Second Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POSEE CHUNG VS. RICK QURESHI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 2, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT RICK QURESHI MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS GRANTED, subject to opposition. March 2, 2018 service of Summons and Complaint is quashed. Proof of Service for service by positing and mailing filed on March 7, 2018 does not include evidence of service of Summons by certified mail to 520 Fredrick as required by Court's March 1, 2018 and March 12, 2018 orders. (POS executed by Wendy Rosener is for service by certified mail to 520 Fredric of Complaint, Pre-Judgment Claim and Ex-parte application). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QIANG WU VS. JESSICA BAYZE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant'S Responses To Discovery, Production Of Documents And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And/Or Her Counsel Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday April 2, 2018, line 3. PLAINTIFF QIANG WU Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant'S Responses To Discovery, Production Of Documents And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And/Or Her Counsel Of Record GRANTED. Documents shall be produced within 3 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted against defendant in the amount of $1,896. = (501/REQ)
